description: Created websites according to given templates and solved tasks using JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3 and Bootstrap 5.
Helped students understand given tasks and reviewed their homework assignments.
Used pure JavaScript and ExpressJS to create backend services. Built front-end web sites from scratch using ReactJS and NextJS, and created backend APIs with NextJS.
Responsible for responsive design, built responsive sites using ReactJS and Mantine.dev, and created new pages.
Created a CDN with NodeJS/ExpressJS and used NextJS for the main backend. Deployed the site on AWS using Docker and pm2.
Created automation bots using Automation Anywhere Control Room, built forms and processes, developed co-pilot bots, and used Generative AI tools including Document AI (IQ Bot).
Read scientific papers and implemented deep learning models for time series analysis. Plotted and compared results against other experiments.
Working on multiple CRM and Dialer projects (~20 projects). Using NodeJS for backend and ReactJS for frontend. Managing social media messages via RabbitMQ.
